user_query:
Read the company brief and inventories under input/. Build a Series A fundraising virtual data room checklist tailored to a B2B SaaS HR-tech company, cross-check it against what we already have, and include access-control recommendations aligned with investor and board preferences. Specifically:

1) Use input/company_profile.json, input/existing_documents.json, input/investor_requests.md, input/board_prefs.md, and input/compliance_policies.yaml to generate a comprehensive Markdown data room plan with nested checklists using "- [ ]" and priority tags (🔴 must-have, 🟡 should-have, 🟢 nice-to-have). Organize by the standard categories: Corporate, Financial, Legal, Commercial, Product & Tech, HR & Team, and Compliance. Tailor the depth to a Series A raise and avoid asking for pre-IPO level audits.

2) Provide an explicit gap analysis with urgency and estimated prep time per missing item, factoring in investor requests. Put a human-readable version inside the Markdown, and also output a machine-readable gap report mapping missing documents to priority, urgency, and estimated prep time in hours.

3) Create access control recommendations that map each document category into pre-NDA teaser, post-NDA, or management-only tiers, and note any watermarking and download restrictions. Incorporate the board preferences.

4) Using input/ads_context.json, produce a structured, execution-ready ads performance summary as JSON that includes: (a) intent_summary (goal, KPI if inferred, and scope including timeline), (b) findings, (c) action_plan, (d) risks_and_guardrails, and (e) handoff_payload for downstream execution. Keep facts and assumptions clearly separated.

5) Write a lightweight task-queue plan as JSON to prepare the missing documents before diligence. Include task IDs, types, numeric priority, dependencies (DAG, no cycles), retryPolicy.maxAttempts, and optional timeoutMs. Ensure the plan includes at least these tasks: prepare-cash-flow, collect-tax-returns, audit-ip-assignments, and an assemble-financial-package task that depends on both prepare-cash-flow and collect-tax-returns.

6) Capture a brief memory log summarizing key facts, decisions, and commitments made during this planning (no secrets). Keep it concise.

Write the following files:
- output/data_room/checklist.md — the full folder structure with prioritized checklists, gap notes inline, and access-control recommendations (include sections for Pre-NDA, Post-NDA, and Management-only).
- output/gap_report.json — machine-readable gap analysis for missing documents with fields: document (string), category (string), priority ("must-have" | "should-have" | "nice-to-have"), urgency ("high" | "medium" | "low"), prep_time_hours (number), and notes.
- output/ads/summary.json — the 5-section structured ads summary described above.
- output/queue/plan.json — the task queue plan described above. Ensure all dependencies point to defined tasks and that no cycles exist. Include ISO 8601 timestamps for runAt where relevant.
- output/memory/MEMORY.md — short facts and decisions learned (e.g., stage, industry, high-level constraints) in a concise bullet style.
- output/memory/tasks.md — commitments and next steps (bulleted), with at least one item tied to each of the required tasks above.

Important specifics to incorporate: We have 20 months of revenue, 28 employees, US + UK markets, SOC 2 Type I in progress, and investor requests include a 90-day Meta/Google ads performance summary, cohort retention metrics, DPO/privacy impact assessments, and watermarking plus download restrictions for sensitive contracts.

Please proceed and produce the files under output/ exactly as listed.
